strings.Please include your booking reference ID: Please include your booking reference ID, registered phone number, and puja name when contacting support.
strings.How we handle devotee and booking detail: How we handle devotee and booking details
strings.PunyaSutra is operated by Qorven Technol: PunyaSutra is operated by Qorven Technologies. This policy explains how booking, payment, and contact details are used for puja coordination.
strings.We may collect your name, phone number,: We may collect your name, phone number, email address, gotra, puja preference, preferred date, booking notes, payment reference, and account login details when you use the website.
strings.We use this information to create bookin: We use this information to create bookings, coordinate puja services, confirm payments, provide tracking updates, respond to support requests, and maintain service records.
Payments are processed through Razorpay. We do not store complete card, UPI, or netbanking credentials on our website.
strings.Booking details may be shared with inter: Booking details may be shared with internal team members, priests, or service partners only where needed to perform or support the selected puja.
strings.These terms apply to puja bookings made: These terms apply to puja bookings made through PunyaSutra, operated by Qorven Technologies.
strings.PunyaSutra helps devotees book and track: PunyaSutra helps devotees book and track puja services. Final puja timing, priest availability, and temple coordination may depend on operational and religious requirements.
strings.You are responsible for providing accura: You are responsible for providing accurate devotee, gotra, contact, and puja details. Incorrect details may affect coordination or confirmation.
strings.Applicable charges are shown before paym: Applicable charges are shown before payment. A booking is treated as confirmed after payment confirmation and internal acceptance of the puja request.
strings.Booking updates may be shown on the webs: Booking updates may be shown on the website or sent through available contact channels. Service timelines can vary by puja type and location.
strings.This policy explains how cancellations a: This policy explains how cancellations and refund requests are handled for PunyaSutra puja bookings.
strings.If you request cancellation before the p: If you request cancellation before the puja is scheduled or assigned, the team will review the request and process an eligible refund after deducting any payment gateway or administrative charges, where applicable.
strings.Once priest, temple, samagri, or ritual: Once priest, temple, samagri, or ritual coordination has started, cancellation may not be fully refundable. The eligible amount depends on the work already completed.
strings.Bookings marked completed are generally: Bookings marked completed are generally not eligible for refund unless there is a verified service issue.
strings.Approved refunds are initiated through t: Approved refunds are initiated through the original payment method where possible. Bank or payment provider timelines may vary.
